supply_chain.dependencies: Dependence on clients' ability to pay rent under long-term net lease agreements; reliance on third-party property managers for international properties
supply_chain.risks: Client defaults or bankruptcies; supply chain disruptions affecting clients' operations; reliance on external property managers for international assets

regulatory_risks: REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code Sections 856-860
Changes in U.S. or non-U.S. tax laws and regulations
Complex and changing laws, regulations, policies, and executive orders (local, international, federal)
Environmental laws and regulations (hazardous substances, asbestos, air emissions, water discharges)
Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) compliance requirements
Fire, safety, building codes, and land use regulations
Gaming regulatory authorities oversight (licensing, operations, compliance)
Climate change and environmental disclosure requirements (federal, state, international)
Foreign laws and regulations in international jurisdictions (U.K., Europe)
Income tax laws in international territories
U.K. government migration from Retail Price Index (RPI) to alternative inflation measures

sanction_risks: Sanctions restrictions mentioned as regulatory risk
Compliance with sanctions as part of regulatory obligations
